prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai Sirius 4G63T (Mitsubishi-sourced 2.0L turbo inline-4, 16V DOHC, 85mm bore x 88mm stroke) with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crank, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression pistons. Turbocharged with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 80mm titanium tip.

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 with custom wiring harness by iWire, paired with a Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband O2 sensor and AEM X-Series digital dash for real-time monitoring. Fuel system upgraded to a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping), Cusco 22mm front sway bar, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro. Braking system upgraded to StopTech ST-60 two-piece rotors (328mm front, 300mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PONY SPORT-specific widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a duckbill rear spoiler by Seibon Carbon. Painted in Hyundai Racing Yellow (code: Y2R) with matte black accents.

OEM+ interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara and custom embroidered Hyundai Pony Sport logos. Roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with bolt-in door bars and harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.

Lightweight 17x9 ET0 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/45R17 tires. Custom front splitter with adjustable canards by Varis, and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks and a central exhaust exit.
